subcodes.title: Words to Nuru'd-Din Mumtazi et al in May 1920
subcodes.first_line: in past religions the holy scriptures had been in one style of revelation but in this Faith the Writings were of many styles and kinds, revealed as tablets, prayers, treatises, etc.
subcodes.first_line_orig: در زمان قبل قرآن یک شأن داشت، انجیل یک شاٌن داشت
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion
